subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath manifested Himself and rent asunder the veils, Who hath drawn aside the curtain through the power of His mysteries and shed forth His luminous rays [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی و کشف الغطاء و هتک الستار بغلبه الاسرار و فاض بالانوار و
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant
